name: DEMO — UC San Diego Staff Performance Appraisal (SPA)
service: DEMO engagement — illustrative as-is map of the UC San Diego annual Staff Performance Appraisal (SPA) lifecycle, coordinated through the SPA system (spa.ucsd.edu). Cycle May 1 – April 30; campus deadline COB Monday, June 15, 2026.
scopeEnd: Signed appraisal filed in personnel file
